Debug_Log_TriggerBody.description: DEBUG: Log the full trigger body to validate structure (wrapping check)

Log_TriggerBody_To_Proxy.description: POST trigger body to ServiceBusProxy for logging

Initialize_Correlation_ID.description: Extract or generate correlation ID from Service Bus message properties - Best Practice #8

inputs.message: Service Bus trigger fired - message received from queue

Log_Trigger_Received.description: LOG: Trigger fired - captures full trigger output for debugging

Parse_Message_Payload.description: Extract message ID and parse payload - ContentDataJson or base64 decode ContentData

Log_Parsed_Message_To_Proxy.description: POST parsed message payload to ServiceBusProxy for debugging

Detect_Entity_Type.description: Detect entity type from event type (Vendor)

Extract_Business_Context.description: Extract business context for Vendor entity

Log_Message_Decoded.description: LOG: Message parsed from ContentDataJson or base64 decoded with business context

Check_Inbox_For_Duplicate.description: Check if query returned any results - indicates duplicate

Log_Duplicate_Detected.description: Log duplicate to Application Insights with entity-specific business context

Terminate_Duplicate.description: Terminate successfully - duplicate message already processed

Insert_Into_Inbox.description: Idempotent by UNIQUE constraint on MessageId - RETRY DISABLED (Best Practice #9)

Determine_Template_Name.description: Template name from parameter - uses Liquid template specified in deployment

Insert_Into_Outbox.description: Insert canonical event to Outbox with OUTPUT_TOPIC as destination

Publish_To_Service_Bus_Topic.description: Publish canonical event to output topic specified in parameter

Log_Message_Queued.description: Log to Application Insights - message published to output topic

Terminate_Success.description: Terminate successfully - message processed and queued

Log_Error.description: Log error to Application Insights with entity-specific business context - Best Practice #7

INPUT_QUEUE.description: Service Bus queue to listen to

OUTPUT_TOPIC.description: Service Bus topic to publish canonical event

When_a_message_is_received_in_a_queue.description: Service Bus queue trigger - retrieves messages from INPUT_QUEUE parameter. Polls every 30 seconds
